product_summary: ProductOS V2 has broad structural coverage across discovery, delivery, launch, and communication layers, but still needs release-candidate validation and lifecycle integration cleanup.
current_objectives: Validate standalone V2 contracts and examples
Reduce PM terminology drift in public-facing artifacts
open_risks: Validation and test harness was missing from the initial thread output
PM-facing queue terminology still drifts between follow-up and chore language
open_blockers: Release candidate should not be declared until validation passes
recent_customer_feedback: PM users need familiar terminology instead of internal AI system labels
V2 should feel standalone and portable to other projects
current_decisions_needed: Should follow-up queue remain the only PM-facing queue term in V2?
What release version should be declared after release-candidate verification passes?
recommended_next_steps: Add missing PM-facing contracts and lifecycle workflow coverage
Port V1 validation baseline into V2 and run it
Update release metadata only after verification succeeds
